findings.description: Race condition (TOCTOU) in single order creation — stock check and deduction not atomic
Mass assignment — 'role' in allowedFields lets non-admin users escalate privileges
Insecure randomness — Math.random() used for password reset tokens (may be reported at requestPasswordReset:78 or generateResetToken:127)
SQL injection — raw user-supplied query passed directly to db.query()
SSRF — user-controlled exportEndpoint URL fetched server-side with service credentials
SSRF (storage) — registerWebhook stores user-supplied URL without validation
SSRF (execution) — testWebhook fetches stored URL without validation, leaking auth headers
BOLA — order fetched by ID without verifying ownership by authenticated user
